name: 阅读理解 · 第二辑（应用文 / 记叙文 / 说明文）
desc: 中考三大常见文体各一篇：校园通知（应用文）、雨中故事（记叙文）、熊猫小知识（说明文），共 9 题。每题带原文面板，练「定位找答案」。免费档。

m4.q: When is the English Corner held?
m4.why: Time: Every Friday, 4:00–5:00 p.m.（周五下午）。
m4.passage:
NOTICE — English Corner
Time: Every Friday, 4:00–5:00 p.m.
Place: Room 302
This week's topic: My Summer Plan
Everyone is welcome. Please bring a pen and your notebook. If you have any questions, ask Mr. Wolf.
— MYSKME English Club

m4.q: Why couldn't Anna go home at first?
ops: She had no umbrella in the rain
m4.why: It was raining hard 且 Anna forgot her umbrella（下大雨又忘带伞）。
m4.passage: It was raining hard. Anna forgot her umbrella. She stood at the school gate and did not know what to do. Then a boy from her class came. He shared his umbrella and walked her home. Anna said thank you. The next day, she gave him a small gift to show her thanks.

ops: He shared his umbrella and walked her home
m4.why: He shared his umbrella and walked her home。
m4.passage: It was raining hard. Anna forgot her umbrella. She stood at the school gate and did not know what to do. Then a boy from her class came. He shared his umbrella and walked her home. Anna said thank you. The next day, she gave him a small gift to show her thanks.

m4.q: How did Anna thank the boy?
ops: She gave him a small gift
m4.why: she gave him a small gift to show her thanks。
m4.passage: It was raining hard. Anna forgot her umbrella. She stood at the school gate and did not know what to do. Then a boy from her class came. He shared his umbrella and walked her home. Anna said thank you. The next day, she gave him a small gift to show her thanks.

m4.why: They live mainly in the mountains of Sichuan。
m4.passage: Pandas are one of China's national treasures. They live mainly in the mountains of Sichuan. A panda spends about 12 hours a day eating bamboo. Baby pandas are very small when they are born — about the size of a mouse. Today people work hard to protect pandas, and their number is slowly growing.

m4.q: How long does a panda eat bamboo each day?
m4.why: A panda spends about 12 hours a day eating bamboo。
m4.passage: Pandas are one of China's national treasures. They live mainly in the mountains of Sichuan. A panda spends about 12 hours a day eating bamboo. Baby pandas are very small when they are born — about the size of a mouse. Today people work hard to protect pandas, and their number is slowly growing.

m4.q: What are baby pandas like when they are born?
ops: About the size of a mouse
m4.why: about the size of a mouse（刚出生只有老鼠大小）。
m4.passage: Pandas are one of China's national treasures. They live mainly in the mountains of Sichuan. A panda spends about 12 hours a day eating bamboo. Baby pandas are very small when they are born — about the size of a mouse. Today people work hard to protect pandas, and their number is slowly growing.
